name: Remote Database Scanner
notes: Reports a scan from a remote host against other local or remote targets. At least 30 hosts were scanned in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: where the attack context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when we see an event match any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Database Ports

when we see any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP(s) within 10 minutes
thresholds: when we see any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP(s) within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Remote Database Scanner on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where the attack context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when we see an event match any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Database Ports

AND when we see any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 29 destination IP(s) within 10 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Remote Database Scanner Detected
Event description: Detected a scan from a remote host against other local or remote targets. At least 30 hosts were scanned in 10 minutes.
